languages.text: "Кхм... Пронесло, кажись. Надо бы красные мантии позвать, пусть глянут".
"Ahem... That was close. Better call the red robes, let them have a look."

languages.text: “咳……真够惊险的。最好还是把那些红袍子叫来，让他们检查一下。”

languages.text: "Öhö... Ucuz atlattık. Kırmızı cübbelileri çağırsak iyi olur, bir baksınlar."
languages.original_text: "Ahem... That was close. Better call the red robes, let them have a look."

languages.text: « Hum... Ce n'est pas passé loin. Mieux vaut demander aux robes rouges d'y jeter un coup d'œil. »
languages.original_text: "Ahem... That was close. Better call the red robes, let them have a look."

languages.text: «Ejem... Ha estado cerca. Será mejor llamar a los de la túnica roja y que ellos le echen un vistazo».
languages.original_text: "Ahem... That was close. Better call the red robes, let them have a look."

traits.locale_text: «Ejem... Ha estado cerca. Será mejor llamar a los de la túnica roja y que ellos le echen un vistazo».

languages.text: "Ähem ... Das war knapp. Wir sollten die Roten Roben rufen. Die sollen sich das mal ansehen."
languages.original_text: "Ahem... That was close. Better call the red robes, let them have a look."

traits.locale_text: "Ähem ... Das war knapp. Wir sollten die Roten Roben rufen. Die sollen sich das mal ansehen."

languages.text: 「あー……危なかった。赤衣の連中を呼んで、見てもらったほうがいいな」
languages.original_text: "Ahem... That was close. Better call the red robes, let them have a look."

traits.locale_text: 「あー……危なかった。赤衣の連中を呼んで、見てもらったほうがいいな」
